description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in business-casual attire, featuring a buttoned-up collared shirt tucked into fitted trousers. The figure has a neatly groomed hairstyle and wears glasses, giving a professional appearance. The shirt is long-sleeved and the trousers are paired with a belt, adding to the formal look. The shoes are classic and appropriate for an office or urban environment. The figure's hands are relaxed at the sides, and the overall build is average and proportionate. The asset is detailed with realistic human proportions and subtle clothing folds.
description: A business-casual adult male with glasses, collared shirt, fitted trousers, and classic shoes, standing upright with a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, glasses, belt, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, glasses, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, trousers, and hairstyle, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and straight stance.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve collared shirt and fitted trousers with a belt, business-casual style
